# platformAddEdge

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for platformAddEdge

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = usePlatformAddEdgeMutation(); mutate({ input: '<PlatformAddEdgeInput>' });
```

## Examples

### Use usePlatformAddEdgeMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = usePlatformAddEdgeMutation();
mutate({ input: '<PlatformAddEdgeInput>' });
```
